vision_report.temporal_deltas: Across the 5-day sequence, there is zero evidence of plant growth or development. The state of the pots remains static, characterized by bare soil and inert debris.
vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of total biological failure. There are no living specimens present to evaluate.
vision_report.anomalies: The presence of eggshell fragments suggests a previous attempt at soil amendment or pest control, but the absence of any plant life indicates these efforts were unsuccessful or the plants have been removed.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete absence of the registered botanical specimens. The pots contain only soil and inert debris. The sequence shows no change over the 5-day period, confirming that the biome is currently inactive and devoid of plant life. The final image is a black frame, indicating a total loss of visual data or a complete shutdown of the monitoring environment.
